gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (radeonsi, navi21, LLVM 17.0.6, DRM 3.54, 6.6.15-amd64)
notes: Too much latency with the keyboard. This kind of game needs a hyper-reactive keyboard with very few latency, this is not the case here

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6800 XT (radeonsi, navi21, LLVM 18.1.1, DRM 3.57, 6.8.10-300.fc40.x86_64)

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT (radeonsi, navi22, LLVM 17.0.6, DRM 3.57, 6.8.0-45-generic)
notes: Works wonder but be ready to tinker with the graphical settings. It is the nature of game, though, not the fault of Proton or whatever.
